message:
fix(pthread_abi): guard managed mutex overlay from host condvar (bd-79va)

pthread_cond_wait was incorrectly delegating to the host's pthread_cond_wait
when the condvar was host-managed, without checking if the mutex was a
managed (native) mutex. This would pass our managed mutex overlay bytes
to glibc, which could misinterpret them and assert.

Fix: Check both is_managed_condvar AND is_managed_mutex before delegating
to host. If mutex is managed but condvar is host-managed, fall through to
the native wait implementation instead of passing incompatible data to
the host.

br-79va

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
